## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as UI
  participant CH as csvHeaders
  participant EP as ensurePagination
  participant WP as withoutPagination
  participant WA as withAsyncExport
  participant QS as qs
  participant M as moment
  participant L as lodash

  U->>CH: csvHeaders({ tz })
  CH->>L: isNil(tz)
  alt tz is nil
    CH->>M: moment.tz.guess()
  end
  CH-->>U: { Accept: "text/csv", "x-time-zone": tz }

  U->>EP: ensurePagination(url, pagination)
  EP->>EP: new URL(url)
  EP->>EP: check searchParams.has(pageNumber/pageSize)
  alt missing params
    EP->>EP: set pageNumber/pageSize
  end
  EP-->>U: url (maybe modified)

  U->>WP: withoutPagination(queryString)
  WP->>QS: parse(queryString)
  WP->>QS: stringify(filteredParams)
  WP-->>U: queryString without pagination params

  U->>WA: withAsyncExport(queryString, fileName)
  WA->>QS: parse(queryString)
  WA->>QS: stringify({ asyncExport: "true", ..., filename: fileName })
  WA-->>U: queryString with asyncExport and filename
```
